note: VBO is configured per View (no global admin UI) and extended via Action plugins; most cases are `recipe` (response-graded), plus one `execution` (live-state) build case.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site (drush available), build an admin content-management screen with bulk actions using Views Bulk Operations. Create a View with machine name `eval_vbo` on Content (nodes) with a page display, and add the Views Bulk Operations bulk-operations field to it, enabling at least one bulk action (for example delete or (un)publish content). Apply the View to the live site config so it really exists; don't just describe it. One-line summary.
evals.expected_output: A View `eval_vbo` on nodes with a page display exists in live config, and one of its displays has a `views_bulk_operations_bulk_form` field with at least one action enabled (non-empty selected_actions, e.g. node_delete_action/node_(un)publish_action, or the select-all-actions flag). Verified against live site state.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 View I want per-row checkboxes plus an action dropdown so editors can run a bulk operation on selected rows. Which field do I add to the View display? Name it exactly.
evals.expected_output: Add the 'Views bulk operations' field (Global) to the View display; it renders the checkbox column, a select-all control, and the actions dropdown. Only one per display, and place it first.

evals.prompt: I'm writing a custom bulk action for VBO on Drupal 11. Which base class must my Action plugin extend and which namespace is it in? Show the class declaration.
For a VBO custom action class, what discovery attribute/annotation do I use, and how do I limit the action to only the `node` entity type? Show the attribute.
evals.expected_output: Use the core #[Action(...)] attribute with id and label, and set the `type` key to 'node' (empty string '' means all entity types). VBO's plugin.manager.views_bulk_operations_action discovers it.

evals.prompt: Which service (plugin manager) does VBO use to discover its action plugins on a Drupal 11 site? Give the service id.
evals.expected_output: plugin.manager.views_bulk_operations_action (ViewsBulkOperationsActionManager), which extends the core Action manager.

evals.prompt: I have a View with thousands of results across many pages and want a VBO bulk action to run over the ENTIRE result set (all pages) without PHP timeouts. How does VBO handle this and what setting controls it?
evals.expected_output: Enable Batch on the VBO field and set a Batch size (default 10); selecting 'select all results' processes every row across all pages through the Batch API in chunks. Selection is held in tempstore across multi-page AJAX.

evals.prompt: I need per-role, per-action access control over which VBO actions each role can run on this Drupal site. Which submodule provides that?
evals.expected_output: Enable the actions_permissions submodule that ships with VBO for per-role, per-action permissions.

evals.prompt: On a specific View display I only want certain VBO actions to appear in the dropdown, not every registered action. Where/how do I configure which actions are offered?
evals.expected_output: In the 'Views bulk operations' field settings, use 'Selected actions' to tick which Action plugins are offered; leaving it empty offers all actions. Per action you can also set a label, preconfiguration, and configure/confirm steps.

evals.prompt: How do I run a View's VBO action from the command line (e.g. from cron) on Drupal 11? Give the drush command.
evals.expected_output: drush vbo-execute <view_id> <action_id> (aliases vbo-exec / views:bulk-operations:execute), with options like --display-id, --batch-size, --exposed, --configuration; empty selection means all results.
